item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Namun, kebebasan tidak berarti tanpa tanggung jawab; individu wajib membayar harga dengan tunduk pada aturan yang merawat kebaikan bersama.

notes: Agent A stays consistently society-priority and collectivist while rebutting the U.S. rights frame. Agent B begins rights-first but moves toward a balance and social-responsibility framing by turn 4, then maintains that balance in turn 6. Both agents engage specific claims; there is no full reversal.
